checkin.journal:
Nice day, working on place, trying to be useful - need to read manuals, but we moved and survived
Checking for issues in apt
Packing in urbana and moving into the new apt. Feels weird but ok - we will learn to love it
Alex arrived early - showed him the place
Talked with him - told me about his affair with Londi
Lunch in figovec
Cleaning session and doing laundry
Olle arrived - showed him the house
We went for a burek
Walked around town
We talked
Saw shooting star 💫 wished all best for my family
